postReview.title: Spain 5-4 France: Reigning champions edge thriller to reach Nations League final
postReview.description: Spain looked to be cruising through to the Nations League final, but had to withstand a late France fightback to seal their place in Munich.

preReview.title: Yamal, Fabian and Pedri deserve Ballon d'Or nominations – De la Fuente
preReview.description: Luis de la Fuente has tipped Lamine Yamal, Fabian Ruiz and Pedri to challenge Ousmane Dembele for this year's Ballon d'Or.
